blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Weekly/monthly overtime tracking', but the evidence provided does not demonstrate any mechanism or API that confirms this capability. The linked use case describes a scenario where the system alerts about exceeding hours, but there is no explicit evidence of an API or logic that tracks overtime on a weekly or monthly basis. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of an API or logic that tracks weekly/monthly overtime.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the weekly/monthly overtime tracking requirement.
